stemHtml: The purposes of an accumulator in a hydraulic system are to…

options.a: damp pressure fluctuations and serve as a limited alternate source of pressure.
options.b: cool the hydraulic fluid and serve as a limited alternate source of pressure.
options.c: cool the hydraulic fluid and serve as a main pressure source for normal operation.
options.d: damp pressure fluctuations and serve as a main pressure source for normal operation.
